heroSummary: Because pay is never just a number. It is context, power, and where the industry is going. 1,797 designers surveyed across 5 markets in 2024.

intro.title: Data from 1,797 designers across five Southeast Asian markets
intro.body: The 2024 DPA survey captured compensation, career progression, negotiation behaviour, and job market sentiment from Indonesia, Singapore, Malaysia, Vietnam, and Thailand. Every published figure links to a named evidence record. This is first-draft data from the 2024 report source text; sample sizes will be confirmed against the ObservableHQ source sheet in a later pass.
